name: Black Essentials
description: Monochrome dressing as design philosophy. Black pieces that define a decade of personal style.
introduction: A complete black capsule that proves a single colour never reads as limited. When nothing competes for attention, quality becomes visible.
philosophy: Wearing primarily black isn't restriction. It's a decision to let other things matter. Your presence. Your words. Your impact. Not the colour of your shirt.
curatorNotes: The best black wardrobe contains subtle variation. Different fabrics, different proportions, different textures. These pieces never read as uniform.
